name: Claude Mythos 5
description: Claude Mythos 5 is Anthropic's withheld counterpart to [Claude Fable 5](/anthropic/claude-fable-5), announced on the same release day but not exposed as the public rollout model. AI Stats tracks it as the internal Mythos line while Fable remains the public launch target.

details.name: availability
details.value: Claude Mythos 5 was announced alongside [Claude Fable 5](/anthropic/claude-fable-5) on June 9, 2026. Anthropic's public rollout centers on Fable 5, while Mythos 5 remains withheld rather than exposed as a generally available public model.
